findings_addressed.description: No PEP 723 dependency block in acquire_musique.py — clean checkout fails ModuleNotFoundError: datasets
findings_addressed.fix: Added '# /// script' block declaring 'datasets>=3.0' and 'pyarrow>=17', matching acquire_enronqa.py convention. Covers installed 5.0.0.

findings_addressed.description: Reproduce runs dirty the tracked M1 manifest with volatile timestamps (generated_at, acquired_at)
findings_addressed.fix: Removed 'generated_at' from M1 manifest write. Preserved 'acquired_at' in local manifest.json by reading the existing value rather than overwriting with date.today(). Both tracked artifacts are now byte-identical across reproduce runs.

tdd_evidence.red_commit_message: test(0.8.2/M1 Slice 4 fix-1): RED — PEP723 dep block + reproduce-stable manifest assertions
